name: Dryden Gold Corp.
description: Dryden Gold Corp. is a junior gold explorer focused on a dominant 70,250-hectare district-scale land package in the Dryden District of Northwestern Ontario. The company targets high-grade gold mineralization over 50 km of potential strike length along the Manitou-Dinorwic deformation zone, and completed a 15,415-metre drilling campaign in 2025 across the Gold Rock Camp and regional targets.
